zh.lifeSummary: 當Theobald Butler 4th Chief Butler of Ireland於1242年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 維其可洛福阿可洛福 卡素時，他的父親Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland18歲，母親Margery de Burgh16歲。他和Joan FitzJohn至少有1個兒子。他去世在他的家鄉，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 維其可洛福阿可洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Theobald Butler 4th Chief Butler of Ireland was born in 1242, in Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Ireland, his father, Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland, was 18 and his mother, Margery de Burgh, was 16. He had at least 1 son with Joan FitzJohn. He died in his hometown, and was buried in Arklow, County Wicklow, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theobald Butler 4th Chief Butler of Ireland est né en 1242, à Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Irlande, son père, Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margery de Burgh, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Joan FitzJohn. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theobald Butler 4th Chief Butler of Ireland 1242 in Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland 18 und seine Mutter Margery de Burgh 16. Er hatte mit Joan FitzJohn mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Arklow, County Wicklow, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald Butler 4th Chief Butler of Ireland è nato il nel 1242 nel Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Irlanda, il suo padre, Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Burgh, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Joan FitzJohn. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Theobald Butler 4th Chief Butler of Irelandが1242年にアイルランドコウントイ ウィックロウアルクロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Irelandは18歳，母Margery de Burghは16歳であった。彼はJoan FitzJohnとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ウィックロウアルクロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Theobald Butler 4th Chief Butler of Ireland(이)가 1242년 아일랜드 카운티 윅로 아클로 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Burgh(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Joan FitzJohn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 윅로 아클로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald Butler 4th Chief Butler of Ireland nasceu em 1242, em Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Irlanda, seu pai, Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Burgh, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Joan FitzJohn. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theobald Butler 4th Chief Butler of Ireland родился в 1242 г. в местности арклоу кастл, коунти викклоу, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Burgh, 16. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joan FitzJohn. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности арклоу, коунти викклоу, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theobald Butler 4th Chief Butler of Ireland nació en 1242, en Arklow Castle, County Wicklow, Irlanda, su papá, Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margery de Burgh, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Joan FitzJohn. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Arklow, County Wicklow, Irlanda.
